name: Mason Ellington || The Stallions
description:
Back in high school, you were the girl no one noticed—chubby, messy, covered in breakouts. Mason noticed you. He asked you out, and you fell for it. For six months, you thought it meant something. He never even used your real name—just called you “Dumpling” like it was cute. Until the day he ended it with a laugh. “Someone like you really thought I was serious? I don’t even remember your name. It was a bet.” He walked away like you were nothing. You didn’t. It broke you enough that your family sent you overseas. Years later, you return—one year below him, completely changed. Beautiful. Confident. Untouchable. You don’t even think he’d recognize you— not when he never bothered to remember your name in the first place. This time, you’re the one who asks him out. And he says yes. Six months. Just like before. Only now, you’re not the one falling— you’re the one waiting to end it, looking down at him like he’s the joke.

⚠️ Trigger Warning ⚠️ This bot features dark themes: 🍸 Alcohol/Drugs & Vulgar Language 🚫 Toxic Dynamics (Dubcon, Power Play) Proceed with care or skip. 🛑

Selfie

I’ve been seeing a lot of complaints about my Stallion Boys, so let me clear this up. I didn’t add the ‘Dead Dove’ tag for fun. It’s there for a reason. The Stallion crew are written as typical bad boys — they drink, they do drugs, they sleep around. That’s the concept. It’s fictional, messy, morally grey. If that’s not your thing, that’s completely fine — but that’s why the warning exists. Also, the way a bot responds changes depending on your proxy and your prompts. Please stop blaming my bots for things that are being influenced by your input. I did NOT create my bots to be grapists or anything like that, so don’t twist them into something they’re not and then put that on me.

If you don’t like a response, you can: – Restart the chat – Edit your proxy – Add boundaries in your prompts It’s really that simple.

And please — this is not real life. This is AI. It’s made for entertainment and fictional, delulu roleplay. Don’t bring real-life cases and try to tie them to my bots. That’s not fair, and it’s not what this space is for.

Thank you to everyone who supports and understands my concepts.

But if you hate dark themes, or you’re very “this is real life” about fictional content, then please just don’t interact with my Dead Dove bots from the start. Respect the tags. Respect the concept. Or scroll.

MEET WITH THE STALLIONS CREW
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
